codeReview.summary: Implementation covers all listed dashboard-fix behaviors (dead tabs removed, agent-name navigation, richer stream content, expandable reasoning, 20-entry stream window, and entry-type grouping) with no blocking defects found.

issues.description: Add automated assertions for tool-call argument rendering, reasoning expand/collapse interaction, and stream entry-type grouping; current tests primarily cover dead-tab removal, agent link presence, and stream-limit constant.

sharedStateObservations.observation: The gui-worker skill procedure appears broader than this mission's practical verification scope: it mandates TUI tests for GUI work, but this feature (and its contract) validated with UI tests + typecheck only.
sharedStateObservations.evidence: .factory/skills/gui-worker/SKILL.md:56-59 requires `pnpm exec vitest run packages/orchestrator-tui/ --max-workers=3`; handoff commands in mission handoff JSON lines 14-22 include only `pnpm exec vitest run ui/src/ --max-workers=3` and `pnpm -r typecheck`.

summary: PASS — commit e306fa89 satisfies VAL-GUI-DASHFIX-001..006: TopBar dead tabs removed, agent names navigate to agent detail via Link/agentUrl, stream entries include tool arguments, reasoning is expandable, limit is 20, and entry-type transitions are visually separated.
